query: brachytherapy glioblastoma evidence RTOG interstitial clinical trials
citations: [The role of brachytherapy in the treatment of glioblastoma multiforme.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/27180560/)

[High-dose-rate stereotactic brachytherapy for patients with newly diagnosed glioblastoma multiformes.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/12587795/)
[Receipt of brachytherapy is an independent predictor of survival in glioblastoma in the Surveillance, Epidemiology, and End Results database.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/31471790/)
[A novel three-dimensional template combined with MR-guided (125)I brachytherapy for recurrent glioblastoma.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/32513276/)

evidence.claim:
PubMed ID: 27180560. 2017/04/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: Glioblastoma is the most common and aggressive primary tumor in 
adults. A narrative review of all the relevant papers known was conducted.
MATERIALS
evidence.source_title: The role of brachytherapy in the treatment of glioblastoma multiforme.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 27180560. 2017/04/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: Glioblastoma is the most common and aggressive primary tumor in 
adults. A narrative review of all the relevant papers known was conducted.
MATERIALS AND METHODS: Reviews, clinical trials, and randomized controlled 
trials published from 1981 through September 2021 and written, or at least 
abstracted, in English were analyzed.
RESULTS: The standard of care for glioblastoma is the maximum safe resection 
possible, followed by radiation therapy a
